name: Poppi
audience: Health-conscious millennials and Gen Z consumers who want a fun, flavorful alternative to traditional soda with less sugar and added gut-health benefits
vibe: Bright, playful, colorful, upbeat, social-media-friendly, wellness-meets-pop-culture
productType: Canned prebiotic soda made with fruit flavors, apple cider vinegar, and low sugar
purpose: To offer a better-for-you soda that delivers nostalgic, craveable flavors while supporting gut health and reducing sugar compared with conventional soft drinks
ideology: Soda can be fun and indulgent without being loaded with sugar; everyday beverages should combine taste, wellness, and modern lifestyle appeal

research.summary: Poppi is an established prebiotic soda brand positioned as a colorful, gut-health-forward alternative to traditional soda, blending wellness claims with pop-culture energy, nostalgic flavors, and playful social-first branding.
research.aesthetic: Shoot Poppi cans on seamless pastel or bright solid-color backdrops, clean white/off-white counters, glossy acrylic surfaces, poolside/beach settings, modern kitchens, cafes, and colorful urban lifestyle locations. Use a bright, high-saturation color grade with clean whites, soft shadows, and flavor-matched pink, peach, blue, mint, yellow, orange, and red accents; styling is moderate to prop-rich with condensation, ice, fruit slices, glassware, splashes, effervescence, sunglasses, magazines, and other youthful lifestyle props. Lighting should be soft, even, and daylight-like, usually front or three-quarter front lit with minimal hard shadow; compose for square and vertical social crops with centered hero cans, tight label close-ups, flat lays, dynamic splash/motion packshots, and wider lifestyle frames featuring diverse Gen Z/millennial models holding or drinking the product alongside product-only shots.
